name: Peach Pie--9-inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute: Frozen sliced peaches, partly thawed and drained.
2. Make this southern favorite at summer's peak with juicy, ripe peaches.
a. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
b. Prepare pastry.
c. Mix sugar, flour, and cinnamon in a large bowl.
d. Stir in peaches and lemon juice.
e. Pour into pastry-lined pie plate.
f. Dot with margarine.
g. Cover with top crust, ensuring slits are cut in it; seal and flute.
h. Cover the edge with 2- to 3-inch strip of aluminum foil to prevent excessive browning.
3. Remove foil during the last 15 minutes of baking.
4. Bake for about 45 minutes or until the crust is brown and juice begins to bubble through slits in the crust.
5. Serve with ice cream and Raspberry-Curran Sauce if desired.
- 8 Servings
- 360 Calories per Serving
